name: URL-Based Campaign Link Creator
description: Create personalized campaign links directly from a URL like /t/stripe.com. Split-screen creator view with live preview + outreach composer. Supports query params for prospect data (fn, ln, email, cid). Created links feed into ABM Campaigns table with full analytics.

stories.title: Route detection: domain vs campaign code in CampaignLanding
acceptance: If :code param contains a '.', treat as domain -> render CreatorView
If :code param is alphanumeric (6-char code), use existing CampaignLanding flow
Edge case: codes like 'abc.de' should still detect as domain (contains dot)
stories.notes: Simple detection: code.includes('.') -> domain mode. Existing 6-char base62 codes never contain dots.

stories.title: Auth gate + query param parsing for creator view
acceptance: AuthProvider wraps the /t/:code route in App.tsx (lazy, only for domain routes)
If user is not authenticated when visiting /t/domain.com, redirect to app login with return URL
Parse query params: fn, ln, email, cid from URL search params
Pass parsed params to CreatorView component
stories.notes: AuthContext already exists in packages/landing/src/lib/contexts/AuthContext.tsx with useAuth hook. Need to wrap route or use inline auth check. Redirect unauthenticated users to app.use60.com/login?redirect=/t/domain.com

stories.title: CreatorView split-screen component with enrichment
acceptance: Split screen layout: left = SandboxExperience preview (60%), right = OutreachComposer panel (40%)
Calls useDemoResearch(domain) on mount to enrich company data
Shows loading state with agent animation while enrichment runs (~4-6s)
Once enrichment completes, left side shows live SandboxExperience preview
Responsive: stacks vertically on mobile (preview on top, composer below)
stories.notes: Reuse existing SandboxExperience component for the preview. Reuse useDemoResearch hook for enrichment. The preview should be read-only (no tracking, no signup capture).

stories.title: OutreachComposer panel with channel picker + AI draft
acceptance: Channel picker tabs: Email / LinkedIn / Slack
Pre-fills recipient fields from query params (fn, ln, email)
AI-generates outreach message using enrichment data (company, value props, pain points)
Message is editable in a text area before creating the link
Uses enrichment data to build a prompt inspired by sales-sequence skill (company context + personalization)
Calls demo-research or generate-email-sequence for the draft
stories.notes: For MVP, generate a single email draft using the enrichment data. The channel picker changes the format/tone. Call the demo-research edge function which already returns cold_outreach.email_preview in demo_actions. For LinkedIn/Slack, adapt the email content to shorter format client-side.

stories.title: Create Link action: call campaign-enrich + show encoded URL
acceptance: Create Link button calls campaign-enrich edge function with domain, query params, and enrichment data
Uses authenticated Supabase session token (not anon key) for the edge function call
On success, displays the encoded URL (use60.com/t/{code}) with copy-to-clipboard button
Shows 'View in ABM Campaigns' link to the main app campaigns page
Campaign source defaults to 'url-direct' or uses cid query param value
Loading state on button while creating
stories.notes: campaign-enrich already accepts { campaign_name, campaign_source, prospects[], expires_in_days }. Build a single-prospect payload from the domain + query params. Pass research_data from the enrichment so the link loads instantly for prospects.

stories.title: Verify ABM table integration + analytics flow
acceptance: Links created via /t/domain.com appear in ABM Campaigns flat table
Campaign source shows 'url-direct' or custom cid value
Engagement tracking works when prospect visits the encoded URL
View count, engagement score, and visitor data flow correctly
stories.notes: This is a verification story - no code changes expected. The campaign_links table is shared, so links created here automatically appear in AbmCampaignsPage. Just verify the flow end-to-end.

execution.parallelOpportunities: None - stories are sequential due to dependency chain

mvp.delivers: Working URL-to-link flow without outreach composer (just create link from domain)

risks.issue: AuthProvider not currently wrapping landing routes in App.tsx
risks.mitigation: Add AuthProvider lazily only for domain-detected /t/ routes, not all landing pages

risks.issue: campaign-enrich expects authenticated calls but landing package uses anon key for PostgREST
risks.mitigation: CreatorView uses Supabase session token via supabase.functions.invoke() pattern

risks.issue: Split-screen may feel cramped on smaller screens

noChanges.reason: Schema already supports all needed fields
Already reads from campaign_links table - no changes needed
Tracking already works for /t/{code} prospect views
